description: You are performing a renewable energy feasibility study for the Tacoma Dome. A 3D mesh of the dome is located at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\tacoma_dome_lidar_mesh.skp'. Open this file in SketchUp Make 2017. Select ONLY the south-facing half of the dome's roof polygons (facing the negative Green axis). Open the Skelion plugin, configure the solar panels for a flush-mount installation by setting the Tilt angle to 0 degrees, and insert the panels onto the selected surface so they conform to the spherical curvature. Finally, save the model as 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\tacoma_dome_solar_mapped.skp'.
